page_title: Music from Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo
text:
Music from Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo is the soundtrack to the film Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo, released on 28 November 2012. It was composed by Shirō Sagisu and published by King Records via its label STARCHILD with the catalog number KICA-3202~3. http://vgmdb.net/album/35707 

Tracklist
